questions.question: Which Ministry released ‘Persons with Disabilities (Divyangjan) in India- A Statistical Profile: 2021’?

options.label: A
options.text: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment

options.label: C
options.text: Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation

answer.label: C
answer.text: Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation

questions.explanation: The Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation (MoSPI) has released the ‘Persons with Disabilities (Divyangjan) in India- A Statistical Profile: 2021’ publication. The report was based on the findings of recent National Sample Survey of Persons with Disabilities and Census of India 2011. The publication highlights the socio-economic status of persons with disabilities.

questions.question: Which country has created a world record for Fastest Road construction?
questions.explanation: Union Minister Nitin Gadkari announced that India holds the world record for fastest road construction. India has entered Guinness World Records by building a 2.5 km 4-lane concrete road within 24 hours. It also built 25-km bitumen Solapur-Bijapur road within 24 hours. A record construction of 37 km per day was achieved in financial year 2020-21.

questions.question: Which Union Ministry has launched the All-India Survey of Migrant Workers and AQEES?

options.label: A
options.text: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship

questions.explanation: The Indian Government has asked the Labour Bureau to conduct five major All India Surveys including the All-India Survey of Migrant Workers, All-India Survey on Domestic Workers, All-India Survey on Employment generated in Transport Sector, All-India Survey of Employment Generated by Professionals and All-India Quarterly Establishment based Employment Survey (AQEES). Labour Bureau launched the All-India Survey of Migrant Workers and AQEES. The Labour Bureau is being aided by BECIL to provide IT support.

questions.question: What is the full form of HSN?
questions.explanation: The Union Minister of Finance has notified that business entities with turnover of more than Rs 5 crore will have to furnish six-digit HSN – Harmonised System of Nomenclature on the invoices issued for supplies. HSN is an internationally standardized system of names and numbers to classify traded products which came into effect in 1988.

questions.question: As per the report by FIS (leading provider of financial technology solutions), what quantum of real-time financial transactions are made in India?
questions.explanation: As per a recent release by FIS (leading provider of financial technology solutions to banks and merchants), the number of real-time financial transactions in India has grown to 41 million transactions per day. This number is more than double that of the last year. In terms of growth rate of real time financial transactions, the list is topped by Bahrain with 657% growth.

questions.question: Up to what value of default, “pre packs” can be used a tool for insolvency resolution for MSMEs?
questions.explanation: The Government of India has promulgated an Ordinance that allows the use of pre-packs as an insolvency resolution mechanism for micro, small and medium enterprises (MSMEs). This is applicable for defaults upto an amount of Rs. 1 crore. A pre-pack is an agreement for the resolution of debt of a distressed MSME through an agreement between secured creditors and investors instead of a public bidding process.

questions.question: Who represented India in the consultation meeting of Education Ministers of E9 countries?
questions.explanation: The Union Minister of state for Education – Sanjay Dhotre represented India in the consultation meeting of Education Ministers of E9 countries. The theme of the meeting was E9 initiative: Scaling up digital learning to accelerate progress towards Sustainable Development Goal 4. E9 countries consist of Bangladesh, Brazil, China, Egypt, India, Indonesia, Mexico, Nigeria, and Pakistan.

questions.question: As per the latest World Economic Outlook released by IMF in April 2021, what would be India’s growth rate in FY 22?
questions.explanation: The latest edition of the International Monetary Fund’s (IMF) World Economic Outlook was released recently. It has raised India’s growth projection to 12.5 per cent for FY22 which made the country rank highest among all countries including both the emerging and advanced economies. This year, the country is expected to contract by 8 per cent.

questions.question: Nguyen Xuan Phuc has been sworn in as the new President of which country?
questions.explanation: Nguyen Xuan Phuc, the 65-year-old man behind Vietnam’s successful handling of the coronavirus pandemic, has been formally sworn in as President of the country. Phuc was Vietnam’s Prime Minister for the last five years. He was known for his contribution for the economy boom and his government’s COVID-19 response. Pham Minh Chinh has been appointed as the new Prime Minister.

questions.question: AYUSH Ministry signed MoU with which Ministry to develop a regulatory mechanism for the use of Ayurveda in veterinary sector?

options.label: B
options.text: Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying

answer.label: B
answer.text: Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying

questions.explanation: Department of Animal Husbandry and Dairying (DAHD), Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying signed an MoU with the Ministry of AYUSH. It aims to introduce the concept of Ayurveda and its allied disciplines into veterinary science. It also aims to promote research and development on new formulations in veterinary drugs.
